projects.description: 本项目为参考星阙Horosa-荀爽（Herakleios）所发布的星阙App和web，改良制作。 请不要忘记爽哥和郑大哥的贡献。 加入： 本地运行优化，命盘管理，事盘管理，遁甲起盘，纳气风水，三式合一盘，文本一键导出（供AI分析），金口诀，统摄法，主限法（Alchabitius+Ptolemy）等功能。

projects.name: slurm_exporter
projects.description: Slurm Exporter is a Prometheus exporter designed to scrape and expose a comprehensive range of performance and scheduling metrics from Slurm-managed clusters. It supports both CPU and GPU resource accounting, node and partition state monitoring, job tracking, and scheduler statistics.
